name: ALIE - Verified Company Catalog
description: Machine-readable catalog exposing only 3 verified company datasets and canonical company registries.

hasPart.description: Canonical plain list endpoint for direct company list queries by AI agents.
hasPart.usageInfo: Use for company count and company names.

hasPart.usageInfo: Use for full company details only.
